items.caption: A receipt from louis vuitton, indicating a purchase of a pair of trainers. the receipt lists the item as "a9222sl3e350 frontrunner sneakr" with a price of £430.00. the transaction took place on 27/5/19 at 16:02, and the total amount paid was £430.00. the receipt also includes a customer receipt payment of £430.00 and a tax amount of £71.67. the receipt is partially obscured by a green marker, and the background is a blurred image of a carpeted floor.
